steps.title: Recall the area formula for rectangles
steps.content: For a rectangle, Area = width x length. We're given that Area = $w(w+31)$ and the width is $w$ centimeters.

steps.title: Identify the length from the factored form
steps.content: The expression $w(w+31)$ represents width times length. Since $w$ is the width, $(w+31)$ must be the length. That confirms C is correct.
